offer: For insurance claims coordinators processing 10–20 claims/month, manual tracking causes delays in updates, leading to frustrated clients. We automate status updates instead of manual tracking through spreadsheets and emails.
problem: Manual tracking of claim statuses leads to delays in updates and communication.
channels_free: Post in Reddit communities for insurance claims coordinators
Indie Hackers posts about similar workflows
DM outreach to insurance claims coordinators with demo video
Community forums for sharing tools among claims coordinators
try_it: Let users try dashboard for claim tracking and manual entry option for claims not in the system on 1-3 items
pay: unknown with a clear upgrade path
cheap_execution_checklist: 1-page landing page with the one-liner and CTA
Short demo video showing the manual-first workflow
Collect 10 short interviews from target users
Offer early-access onboarding for first 10 users
Post a weekly progress update in a relevant community
automation_simplification_ideas: One-click export of a simple report
